message.msgTxt: '{"id":"STU-001","name":"Emily Chen","email":"e.chen@university.edu","program":"Computer Science","level":"Junior","gpa":3.8,"status":"Good Standing","advisor":"Dr. Michael Torres","credits":{"completed":78,"inProgress":15,"required":120},"holds":[],"enrolledCourses":[{"id":"CS-401","name":"Advanced Algorithms","credits":3,"schedule":"MWF 10:00-10:50","room":"Tech Hall 201"},{"id":"MATH-301","name":"Calculus III","credits":3,"schedule":"MWF 11:00-11:50","room":"Math Hall 302"},{"id":"CS-350","name":"Operating Systems","credits":3,"schedule":"TTh 11:00-12:30","room":"Tech Hall 105"}],"history":[{"term":"Fall 2024","courses":["CS-305","CS-310","MATH-215"],"credits":15,"gpa":3.9},{"term":"Spring 2024","courses":["CS-201","CS-220","MATH-114"],"credits":15,"gpa":3.7}],"enrollmentRequests":[{"id":"ENR-006","course":"CS-401","courseName":"Advanced Algorithms","type":"Drop","status":"Approved","submitted":"2025-01-20","notes":"Student requested drop within add/drop window."}],"notes":"Dean List Fall 2024. Research assistant for Dr. Torres.","degreeProgressPct":65}'
